title: New Blog Features
content:
I created this post to experiement and show off all the cool things I can do on this blog.

I can now use headers, pretty cool

I can use both inline text and

this kind of text

I can also use links inside of my text like wsg. My favorite part is that I can now use images.

title: My Blogs Are Now Loaded Dynamically
content:
All of these blog pages are now loaded dynamically with Javascript. This is the first time that I have used Js on this website. I can't lie, I created this post to test out the Js. It's nice because I can now just use one singular json file and not have to worry about creating a HTML file for every post. There are still a few things that need to be tweaked but its working for the most part. Im pretty happy with how this turned out. Maybe in the future I will add images and inline code stuff.


Thanks for reading I guess

title: First/Test Blog Post
content:
I have no idea what I'm doing on this website. I'm not really sure how to manage a website but I guess I learn as I go. I was hoping to use php or next.js to make this process easier but I think Github only allows static websites. So for now I'll just stick to the basics, but in the future I want to load content with js rather than making an html page every time I need to display something. I just need a place to show off my work and develop website making skills. Is this a good test/first post? I really don't know.


Thanks for reading I guess
